description: Single Source of Truth for workspace-wide invariants. All dependent documents must match these values. Validated by scripts/validate-templates.ts at pre-commit.

variant_lifecycle.description: Governance rules for variant lifecycle transitions

engagement_criteria_schema.yellow_action: action if no engagement within period

_notes.variant_specific: Variant-specific phase names (e.g., co-security Phase 3 = Threat Modeling) are declared in each variant's variant.json under phases.phase3_name
_notes.variant_agents: Variant-specific agent tiers are declared in each variant's variant.json under agent_tiers

i18n.description: Internationalization policy. locale_codes defines all language codes recognized as valid translation zones. Files inside <lang-code>/ or locales/<lang-code>/ directories are exempt from the English-only documentation rule.
i18n.note: audit.ts and validate-md-language.ts must read locale_codes from this file — do NOT hardcode language codes in scripts.

rootAllowlist.description: Whitelist of files and directories permitted in the workspace root. Anything not in these lists triggers a stray-artifact audit failure.

variant_extensions.description: Optional top-level keys allowed in variant.json beyond the base contract. Validated by validate-templates.ts.

_shared._note: Documentation-only cross-reference. $ref values here are NOT machine-validated JSON Schema refs. For standard JSON Schema, use $defs pattern instead.

agent_manifest.description: Agent roster metadata and optional pipeline configuration. Available in all variants.
agent_manifest.notes: pipeline_order: omit or use [] for variants with parallel/free-form agent dispatch. retry_policy: declares on_fail routing and max_retries per agent. optional[]: agents that can be skipped by PM.

agent_manifest.description: Strict pipeline order, optional flags, skippable flags, and retry policy for lecture workflow agents

retry_policy.description: Per-agent failure routing. on_fail names the agent to return to. max_retries caps loops. failure_condition is an expression evaluated by PM.

sub_fields.optional: Agent names that can be entirely omitted from the workflow run.
sub_fields.skippable: Agent names that run but whose failure is non-blocking (--skip-verify pattern).

agent_manifest.notes: optional[] = omit entirely. skippable[] = run but ignore failure. retry_policy = fail-and-loop-back.

theme_manifest.description: HTML theme definitions for lecture slides
theme_manifest.notes: CSS variable override themes. DOM structure immutable across all themes.

lecture_profile.notes: Scaffolded on new-project creation. Agents load this file at stage start.
